debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝³ : LinearOrder ι
E : Type u_4
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : InfSet ι
inst✝ : Bot ι
X : ι → Ω → E
t : ι
K : ℝ
ω : Ω
⊢ ⨆ s, ⨆ (_ : s ≤ t), ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤
    K +
      {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ ↑t}.indicator
        (fun ω => ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω

failed_attempts:
by
  let τ := hittingAfter (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥
  by_cases hτ : τ ω ≤ t
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_mem hτ]
    refine iSup₂_le fun s hs ↦ ?_
    let u := (min (s : WithTop ι) (τ ω)).untopA
    have h_u_le_tau : (u : WithTop ι) ≤ τ ω := by
      rw [WithTop.coe_untopA]; exact min_le_right _ _
    by_cases h_lt : (u : WithTop ι) < τ ω
    · have : ‖X u ω‖ < K := by
        by_contra h_ge
        have : τ ω ≤ u := hittingAfter_le_of_mem (by simp) h_ge
        exact not_le_of_lt h_lt this
      calc ‖stoppedProcess X τ s ω‖
        _ = ‖X u ω‖ := rfl
        _ ≤ K := le_of_lt this
        _ ≤ K + ‖stoppedValue X τ ω‖ := le_add_of_nonneg_right (norm_nonneg _)
    · have : (u : WithTop ι) = τ ω := le_antisymm h_u_le_tau (not_lt.mp h_lt)
      rw [stoppedProcess, this, stoppedValue]
      simp only [WithTop.untopA_coe]
      exact le_add_of_nonneg_left (by linarith)
  · rw [Set.indicator_of_not_mem hτ, add_zero]
    refine iSup₂_le fun s hs ↦ ?_
    let u := (min (s : WithTop ι) (τ ω)).untopA
    have h_lt : (u : WithTop ι) < τ ω := by
      rw [WithTop.coe_untopA]
      apply lt_of_le_of_lt (min_le_left _ _)
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hs) (not_le.mp hτ)
    have : ‖X u ω‖ < K := by
      by_contra h_ge
      have : τ ω ≤ u := hittingAfter_le_of_mem (by simp) h_ge
      exact not_le_of_lt h_lt this
    exact le_of_lt this
